标题: MMJ fleece-lined curved knife denim pants, men's plush skull pattern street-style loose long pants. MMJ's popular style has arrived, featuring a loose curved knife design, high-end Japanese denim cotton fabric, and thick fleece lining for warmth and comfort. The intricate craftsmanship elevates the practicality of this piece to its peak. A stunning dark street fashion trend is emerging, presenting a perfect high-street visual experience! MMJ is a leading figure in the high-street fashion scene, and this design features a casual loose curved knife cut, with skull plush patterns at the pockets, exuding an authentic American street vibe that creates a visually striking impact. It embodies the essence of high-end street fashion. Crafted with top-notch denim fabric, the American loose elastic denim undergoes high-end washing processes to achieve a textured effect. The fleece lining provides warmth and comfort. The fabric's softness and comfort are impeccable, with an unbeatable feel and meticulous attention to detail, taking two months to produce! Sizes: M-3XL.

MMJ's new summer men's casual shorts feature top-notch craftsmanship with breathable and comfortable high-quality custom fabric. The details are impeccable, with premium accessories and original logo design concept. The fabric is breathable, elastic, and extremely comfortable, with a delicate and soft touch. The fit is excellent when worn. Sizes range from M to XXXL. Please provide your height and weight when placing an order.
